name: 危機懸念型
description: Ashley被綁架囚禁，Cora趁機以「妻子」身份出現在甦醒的Tristan身邊，觀眾在極度焦慮中被迫等待下一段劇情。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: From now on, I'll be the one by your side. / Tristan, you're awake. / I missed you so much. Tristan, you were in a coma for almost a month. I thought I lost you.

examples.drama_title: 冷面總裁30年從未笑過，竟被新娶的小嬌妻逗笑，冰山徹底融化，從此把她放在手心寵 #灰姑娘霸總 #瑪麗蘇 #甜寵 #顧總的小太陽
examples.excerpt: #追妻火葬場 #虐戀 #狗血——暗示劇情中存在危機和虐心轉折作為集末鉤子
examples.context: 集末最後一個鏡頭或台詞

examples.drama_title: Transmigrated Into the Body of Unloved Princess,Using Modern Knowledge,She Ascends Throne.#cdrama
examples.excerpt: Latest plot｜Fastest pace｜The strongest sense of excitement（字幕資料不足，基於頻道描述推斷：每集結尾設計強懸念以維持觀看連續性）
examples.context: 每集最後幾秒，通常是敵人發難或陰謀揭露的瞬間
